paper.title: Claw-Eval: Towards Trustworthy Evaluation of Autonomous Agents
paper.withdrawal_status: The immutable v3 arXiv API summary contains no withdrawal or retraction notice.

official_release.relationship_to_paper: The acquired default-branch commit is dated ten days after immutable arXiv v3. It is therefore an official post-v3 snapshot, not a demonstrated paper-time implementation. The repository exposed no Git tags through git ls-remote at acquisition. It has been archived and integrity-checked but not deeply audited by the source-acquisition worker.

acquisition_scope: Downloaded and verified the complete immutable arXiv v3 PDF and HTML, extracted the 24-page PDF with pdftotext -layout, and pinned, downloaded, hashed, and integrity-checked the complete official default-branch repository archive. No deep paper review, result reproduction, grader audit, or capability/safety/robustness claim is made.
local_storage_note: The PDF, byte-exact official HTML, and 405 MB release ZIP are ignored local evidence; the extracted paper text, API metadata, paper-index entry, and this provenance record are versioned. Re-fetch ignored artifacts from the immutable or pinned URLs above and verify SHA-256 when absent locally.
